title: rubus chiliadenus
intro: Rubus chiliadenus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus chiliadenus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
